2606.14672.title: Towards Direct Latent-Space Synthesis for Parallel Branches in LLM-Agent Workflows
2606.14672.paper_summary: Large language models increasingly serve as execution engines for agentic systems, yet they still consume context through a sequential text interface. This creates a mismatch with modern structured agent workflows, in which independent branches explore subtasks, retrieve evidence, or generate candidate solutions before a final synthesis step. Existing systems typically merge these branches by concatenating their textual outputs, which discards the parallel structure and incurs redundant prefill computation. In this work, we introduce Parallel-Synthesis, a plug-and-play framework that enables a synthesizer to directly consume the KV caches produced by parallel worker agents. Parallel-Synthesis combines a cache mapper that calibrates independently generated branch caches with a fine-tuned synthesizer adapter that enables generation from this non-sequential cache interface. We train Parallel-Synthesis using data that exposes the synthesizer to parallel cache contexts, teaches aggregation across cached branches, and distills reasoning behavior from standard text-concatenation-based synthesis. Across nine downstream datasets spanning math, science QA, code generation, GAIA, and multi-agent database diagnosis, Parallel-Synthesis matches or outperforms text-based synthesis on seven datasets and remains close on the other two. It also reduces time-to-first-token by 2.5x-11x, suggesting that direct cache-based synthesis is a promising interface for more native and efficient synthesis over parallel agent branches.
2606.14672.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型越來越多地作為代理系統的執行引擎，但它們仍然通過序列文本介面來消耗上下文。這與現代結構化代理工作流程存在不匹配，在這些工作流程中，獨立的分支探索子任務、檢索證據或生成候選解決方案，然後進行最終的綜合步驟。現有系統通常通過連接它們的文本輸出來合併這些分支，這會丟棄並行結構並產生冗餘的預填計算。在這項工作中，我們介紹了Parallel-Synthesis，一個即插即用的框架，能夠使合成器直接消耗由並行工作代理生成的KV快取。Parallel-Synthesis結合了一個快取映射器，該映射器校準獨立生成的分支快取，並配備了一個經過微調的合成器適配器，使其能夠從這個非序列快取介面生成內容。我們使用數據訓練Parallel-Synthesis，以使合成器接觸到並行快取上下文，教會在快取分支之間進行聚合，並從基於標準文本連接的合成中提煉推理行為。在涵蓋數學、科學問答、代碼生成、GAIA和多代理數據庫診斷的九個下游數據集上，Parallel-Synthesis在七個數據集上與基於文本的合成相匹配或表現更好，並在另外兩個數據集上保持接近。它還將首次標記的時間縮短了2.5倍至11倍，這表明基於快取的直接合成是一個對於更本地化和高效的並行代理分支合成的有前景的介面。
2606.14672.author: Shikun Liu et.al.
2606.14672.authors: Shikun Liu, Mufei Li, Dongqi Fu, Haoyu Wang, Yinglong Xia, Hong Li, Hong Yan, Pan Li
